meta.name: Tokyo Night Aurora
meta.author: Manifest OS
meta.description: An r/unixporn-tier Hyprland rice: floating Tokyo Night waybar islands, heavy blur, an animated aurora gradient border, popin animations, a glassy launcher and matched terminal/notifications — all declared, no post-install shell.

files.content:
# Tokyo Night Aurora — Manifest OS
monitor = , preferred, auto, 1.0

# ------- Autostart -------
exec-once = waybar
exec-once = mako
exec-once = manifest-wallpaper
exec-once = nm-applet --indicator
exec-once = hypridle
exec-once = /usr/lib/polkit-gnome/polkit-gnome-authentication-agent-1

env = XCURSOR_SIZE,24
env = HYPRCURSOR_SIZE,24
env = QT_QPA_PLATFORMTHEME,qt5ct

input {
    kb_layout = us
    follow_mouse = 1
    sensitivity = 0
    touchpad {
        natural_scroll = true
        tap-to-click = true
    }
}

general {
    gaps_in = 6
    gaps_out = 16
    border_size = 2
    # animated aurora gradient border
    col.active_border = rgba(7aa2f7ee) rgba(bb9af7ee) rgba(7dcfffee) 45deg
    col.inactive_border = rgba(292e42aa)
    layout = dwindle
    resize_on_border = true
    allow_tearing = false
}

decoration {
    rounding = 14
    active_opacity = 0.96
    inactive_opacity = 0.90
    blur {
        enabled = true
        size = 8
        passes = 3
        new_optimizations = true
        xray = true
        ignore_opacity = true
        noise = 0.015
        contrast = 1.10
        brightness = 1.0
        vibrancy = 0.25
        vibrancy_darkness = 0.2
    }
    shadow {
        enabled = true
        range = 24
        render_power = 3
        color = rgba(11121aee)
        color_inactive = rgba(11121a99)
    }
    dim_inactive = true
    dim_strength = 0.08
}

animations {
    enabled = true
    bezier = wind, 0.05, 0.9, 0.1, 1.05
    bezier = overshot, 0.13, 0.99, 0.29, 1.10
    bezier = smoothOut, 0.36, 0.0, 0.66, -0.56
    bezier = liner, 1, 1, 1, 1
    animation = windows, 1, 5, overshot, popin 60%
    animation = windowsOut, 1, 4, smoothOut, popin 60%
    animation = border, 1, 8, default
    animation = borderangle, 1, 90, liner, loop
    animation = fade, 1, 6, default
    animation = workspaces, 1, 5, wind, slidefade 20%
}

dwindle {
    preserve_split = true
    smart_split = false
    smart_resizing = true
}

master {
    new_status = master
}

misc {
    disable_hyprland_logo = true
    force_default_wallpaper = 0
}


# ------- Keybindings -------
$mainMod = SUPER

bind = $mainMod, Return, exec, kitty
bind = $mainMod, D, exec, wofi --show drun
bind = $mainMod, B, exec, firefox
bind = $mainMod, E, exec, nautilus
bind = $mainMod, Q, killactive,
bind = $mainMod, F, fullscreen, 0
bind = $mainMod, V, togglefloating,
bind = $mainMod, P, pseudo,
bind = $mainMod, L, exec, hyprlock
bind = $mainMod, C, exec, hyprpicker -a
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, E, exit,

# focus
bind = $mainMod, left, movefocus, l
bind = $mainMod, right, movefocus, r
bind = $mainMod, up, movefocus, u
bind = $mainMod, down, movefocus, d

# workspaces
bind = $mainMod, 1, workspace, 1
bind = $mainMod, 2, workspace, 2
bind = $mainMod, 3, workspace, 3
bind = $mainMod, 4, workspace, 4
bind = $mainMod, 5, workspace, 5
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 1, movetoworkspace, 1
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 2, movetoworkspace, 2
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 3, movetoworkspace, 3
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 4, movetoworkspace, 4
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 5, movetoworkspace, 5
bind = $mainMod, mouse_down, workspace, e+1
bind = $mainMod, mouse_up, workspace, e-1

# move/resize with mouse
bindm = $mainMod, mouse:272, movewindow
bindm = $mainMod, mouse:273, resizewindow

# 3-finger swipe between workspaces
gesture = 3, horizontal, workspace

# screenshots
bind = , Print, exec, grim -g "$(slurp)" ~/Pictures/screenshot-$(date +%s).png

# media & brightness
binde = , XF86AudioRaiseVolume, exec, wpctl set-volume @DEFAULT_AUDIO_SINK@ 5%+
binde = , XF86AudioLowerVolume, exec, wpctl set-volume @DEFAULT_AUDIO_SINK@ 5%-
bind = , XF86AudioMute, exec, wpctl set-mute @DEFAULT_AUDIO_SINK@ toggle
bind = , XF86AudioPlay, exec, playerctl play-pause
bind = , XF86AudioNext, exec, playerctl next
bind = , XF86AudioPrev, exec, playerctl previous
binde = , XF86MonBrightnessUp, exec, brightnessctl set +5%
binde = , XF86MonBrightnessDown, exec, brightnessctl set 5%-

width=560
height=420
location=center
show=drun
prompt=
allow_images=true
image_size=28
insensitive=true
gtk_dark=true

# Tokyo Night Aurora
font=JetBrainsMono Nerd Font 10
width=340
height=120
margin=14
padding=14
border-size=2
border-radius=16
background-color=#1a1b26ee
text-color=#c0caf5
border-color=#7aa2f7
progress-color=over #292e42
default-timeout=6000
icons=1
max-icon-size=48

[urgency=high]
border-color=#f7768e
default-timeout=0

# Tokyo Night Aurora
font_family      JetBrainsMono Nerd Font
font_size        11.5
cursor_shape     beam
cursor_blink_interval 0.5
scrollback_lines 10000
enable_audio_bell no
window_padding_width 14
background_opacity 0.82
background_blur 1
confirm_os_window_close 0
hide_window_decorations yes

foreground #c0caf5
background #1a1b26
selection_foreground #1a1b26
selection_background #c0caf5
cursor #c0caf5
color0 #15161e
color1 #f7768e
color2 #9ece6a
color3 #e0af68
color4 #7aa2f7
color5 #bb9af7
color6 #7dcfff
color7 #a9b1d6
color8 #414868
color9 #f7768e
color10 #9ece6a
color11 #e0af68
color12 #7aa2f7
color13 #bb9af7
color14 #7dcfff
color15 #c0caf5

{
  "logo": { "type": "builtin", "source": "arch", "padding": { "top": 1, "left": 2 } },
  "display": { "separator": "  " },
  "modules": [
    "title", "separator",
    { "type": "os", "key": "󰣇 os" },
    { "type": "kernel", "key": " kernel" },
    { "type": "wm", "key": " wm" },
    { "type": "packages", "key": "󰏖 pkgs" },
    { "type": "shell", "key": " shell" },
    { "type": "terminal", "key": " term" },
    { "type": "memory", "key": " mem" },
    "break", "colors"
  ]
}

# Tokyo Night Aurora
add_newline = true
format = "$directory$git_branch$git_status$character"
[character]
success_symbol = "[❯](bold #bb9af7)"
error_symbol = "[❯](bold #f7768e)"
[directory]
style = "bold #7aa2f7"
truncation_length = 3
[git_branch]
symbol = " "
style = "bold #7dcfff"
[git_status]
style = "bold #e0af68"

setopt AUTO_CD INTERACTIVE_COMMENTS SHARE_HISTORY HIST_IGNORE_ALL_DUPS
HISTFILE=~/.zsh_history; HISTSIZE=10000; SAVEHIST=10000
alias ls='eza --icons --group-directories-first'
alias ll='eza -lah --icons --group-directories-first'
alias tree='eza --tree --icons'
alias cat='bat --paging=never'
alias ..='cd ..'
autoload -Uz compinit && compinit
zstyle ':completion:*' menu select
eval "$(starship init zsh)"
fastfetch
